prompt: Read the attached PDF, extract the key points, and keep this read-only.
Extract tables from this DOCX and summarize them without editing files.
Find the current official release note online and cite the source.
Tell me the latest changelog, but no web and offline only.
Review this repository for release-blocking bugs, regression risk, and missing tests.
Do a security audit of this local repo and list high risk findings first.
Search my inbox for the client thread and draft a reply, but do not send it.
Remember this project decision and save it to the local knowledge base.
Remember the key points from this file, but do not save or write anything.
Run a local frontend preview, take screenshots, and fix the responsive layout.
Analyze this CSV, build a KPI dashboard, and write the chart artifact.
Show a dashboard of available capability router entries and verification levels.
